OKR & weekly status reporting tool for t: OKR & weekly status reporting tool for teams.
Creates a new report item in Weekdone.
Updates an existing report item in Weekd: Updates an existing report item in Weekdone.
Creates a new OKR objective in Weekdone.
Updates the description of an existing O: Updates the description of an existing OKR objective in Weekdone.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
The text content of the report item.
The category this item belongs to in you: The category this item belongs to in your weekly report. Custom category IDs (4 and above) are available via the Custom API Call action.
The report week to add this item to, in: The report week to add this item to, in YYYYWW format (e.g. "202403" for week 3 of 2024). Leave empty to use the current week.
The user to assign this item to. Leave e: The user to assign this item to. Leave empty to assign it to yourself.
The team to add this item to. Leave empt: The team to add this item to. Leave empty to use your primary team.
The priority level for this item.
The due date for this item in YYYY-MM-DD: The due date for this item in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2024-03-15"). Leave empty for no due date.
If enabled, only you can see this item. If disabled (default), the item is visible to your team.
The ID of this item in an external syste: The ID of this item in an external system (e.g. a JIRA ticket number or Asana task ID). Maximum 50 characters.
Filter the item list by week in YYYYWW f: Filter the item list by week in YYYYWW format (e.g. "202403" for week 3 of 2024). Leave empty to search the current week.
The report item to update. Change \"Sear: The report item to update. Change "Search Week" above to find items from other weeks.
The new text content for the item. Leave: The new text content for the item. Leave empty to keep the current value.
Move this item to a different report cat: Move this item to a different report category. If you change this, you must also fill in "Target Week" below.
Required when changing the Report Catego: Required when changing the Report Category. The week to move the item into, in YYYYWW format (e.g. "202403").
The new priority level for this item. Le: The new priority level for this item. Leave empty to keep the current value.
The new due date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e: The new due date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2024-03-15"). Leave empty to keep the current value.
The text of the objective (e.g. \"Grow r: The text of the objective (e.g. "Grow revenue by 20% this quarter").
The level this objective applies to. Com: The level this objective applies to. Company objectives apply to the whole organisation; Department, Team, and Personal are scoped to a specific group or individual.
Additional fields required for the selec: Additional fields required for the selected objective level.
The quarter this objective belongs to in: The quarter this objective belongs to in YYYYQ format (e.g. "2024Q1" for Q1 2024, "2024Q3" for Q3 2024). Leave empty to use the current quarter.
Narrow the objective list by level to ma: Narrow the objective list by level to make it easier to find the one you want.
Narrow the objective list by quarter in: Narrow the objective list by quarter in YYYYQ format (e.g. "2024Q1"). Leave empty to show objectives from all periods.
The objective to update. Use \"Filter by: The objective to update. Use "Filter by Level" and "Filter by Quarter" above to narrow the list.
The new text for the objective.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.

Triggers when a new item is added to a W: Triggers when a new item is added to a Weekdone report.
Triggers when a new OKR objective is add: Triggers when a new OKR objective is added in Weekdone.
Only trigger for items belonging to this: Only trigger for items belonging to this user. Leave empty to receive items from all users.
Only trigger for items added to this tea: Only trigger for items added to this team. Leave empty to receive items from all teams.
Only trigger for objectives at a specifi: Only trigger for objectives at a specific level. Leave empty to receive objectives from all levels.
Only trigger for objectives in a specifi: Only trigger for objectives in a specific quarter. Use YYYYQ format (e.g. "2024Q1") or a full year (e.g. "2024"). Leave empty to watch all periods.
